summary: Completed comprehensive testing of advanced breadcrumb and navigation system. All 9 test cases passed - breadcrumbs display correctly on all pages, navigation tracking works properly, and sidebar clicks properly reset the breadcrumb trail.
passed_tests: Dashboard page shows breadcrumb: Home > Sales Overview
Leads page shows breadcrumb: Home > Leads
Lead detail page shows breadcrumb with lead name: Home > Leads > Taj Sarees
Clicking Leads in breadcrumb navigates back to /leads
Clicking Home icon in breadcrumb navigates to /home
Kanban view shows breadcrumb: Home > Kanban View
Accounts list shows breadcrumb: Home > Accounts
Account detail shows breadcrumb with account name: Home > Accounts > Taj Sarees
Sidebar navigation properly resets breadcrumb trail (Lead Detail -> Accounts sidebar = Home > Accounts only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation and breadcrumb system is fully functional. The NavigationContext tracks user paths and creates dynamic breadcrumbs. Sidebar clicks reset trail while in-app navigation (like clicking lead rows) appends to trail. Filter states are preserved when navigating back.

details: Clicking intermediate breadcrumbs (e.g., Leads) navigates to correct page
In-app navigation (clicking rows) appends to breadcrumb trail
Sidebar navigation resets breadcrumb trail properly
Dynamic labels update with entity names (lead name, account name)
